title: Gooey Nutty Italian Prune Crumble
description: A romantic and gooey dessert featuring prunes in a tandoor-inspired topping that is raw-friendly and perfect for breakfast or dessert.

ingredients.name: Caster sugar
ingredients.notes: Coarsely ground for a crunchy texture

instructions: Soak prunes in water overnight. Drain well and chop into chunks.
In a food processor, pulse almonds until finely ground (not too fine).
Add sugar to almond meal and mix well. Mix in chopped walnuts and dates.
Pour prunes into the mixture and stir gently to combine. Transfer to an oven-safe dish or muffin tray lined with parchment paper for easy removal.
Preheat your air fryer or conventional oven to 200°C (392°F).
Bake the mixture for about 15-20 minutes, stirring every few minutes until golden and crispy on top. Ensure not exceeding temperatures that would make them raw-friendly.
Once done, let it cool slightly before serving with coconut flakes as a topping.
